productDisplayName: Murcia Women Casual Baby Pink Handbag
description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured two-tone leatherette upper and elegant toned-down hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Style this with tonal formal ensembles. Two tone textured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front Two handles with rivet detailing Two main zippered compartments with a zippered pocket on the second compartment Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
